---
name: Bug Report
about: Something in Cinder is broken or behaving unexpectedly
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
Please provide a minimal code snippet or step-by-step instructions that trigger the bug.

```c
// your code here
```

## Expected Behaviour
What did you expect to happen?

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened? Include any error messages or output.

## Environment
- **Cinder version:** (e.g. v1.2.0)
- **Platform:** (Linux / macOS / Windows)
- **OS version:** (e.g. Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 15)
- **Compiler & version:** (e.g. gcc 13.2, clang 17)

## Additional Context
Anything else that might be relevant — screenshots, crash logs, etc.

---

> ⚠️ If you think this is a security vulnerability, please **do not open an issue**.
> See [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) for how to report it privately.
>
> ❌ This is not the place for help with SDL2 installation or general C questions.
> For those, please use a forum like [Stack Overflow](https://stackoverflow.com) or the [SDL2 Discord](https://discord.com/invite/SDL2).
